channel.title: 3D Printing on Arjun's Webpage
channel.description: Recent content in 3D Printing on Arjun's Webpage

item.title: baghookthing
item.description:
A backpack holder that can hold small backpacks (like the Quechua 25L Pack I use) onto shelfs or tabletops upto 25mm thick.

In my testing it took up to 5kgs. I have printed it in PLA with 8 wall lines.

item.title: Ender 3
item.description: An Ender 3 is the rite of passage for all 3D Printing enthusiasts. Yes a Bambu lab may be refined, convenient and clean but to become the ultimate hobbyist and maker one must burn their hands cleaning the clogged extruder of an Ender 3. One must blow more money on repairs than the actual cost of the printer in order to get it running.
